title: Behind the Green Lights
writer: Colbert Clark, James Gruen, Cornelius W. Willemse
actors: Norman Foster, Judith Allen, Sidney Blackmer
plot: Dave Britten, a bright young detective in the police force, captures one of J. C. Owen's henchmen and charges him with robbery. Owen then hires Raymond Cortell, a crooked lawyer, to act as the criminal's defense. Cortell not only ...
